chunks.text:
H. No. 1393 / 65 OG No. 17, 4197 (April 28, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5191, April 18, 1968 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING BATAC EMERGENCY HOSPIÂTAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAC, PROVÂINCE OF 1LOCOS NORTE, INTO A GENERAL HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS BATAC GENERAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROÂPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The Batac Emergency Hospital in the MuniciÂpality of Batac, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby conÂverted into a general hospital to be known as Batac General Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of one hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to carry out the purpose of this Act for the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-seven. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the same purpose shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 18, 1968.
